question: I want to track phantom OOS by store cluster — clustered by region and promotion overlap — over the last 90 days. Show me which clusters are chronic offenders.
metric_label: Phantom OOS rate by store cluster
target_grain: one row per (region, promotion_overlap_bucket) over the trailing 90 days

upstream_models.description: Hourly POS from Walmart Retail Link, Amazon Vendor Central, Target Partners Online, Kroger Vendor Portal. Unit velocity and unit_velocity_pct_change.
Daily shelf-compliance signal — joins Retail Link planogram against Manhattan WMS replenishment. Yields shelf_should_have_stock boolean.
Trade-promo calendar from the promo system of record. promo_status ACTIVE / PLANNED / EXPIRED. Joined back to store and date.
Store master with current cluster assignment — region, market, banner. Slowly changing dim.
